phase-plan.purpose: Enable canonical data asset create/update flows from chat and keep content bindings synchronized.
phase-plan.scope: In scope: canonical create/rename/state operations and contentBindings persistence.

task.description: Add canonical-asset operations to chat contract and UI types.
Apply canonical operations in Space Explorer and sync model instances/contentBindings.

dod.criterion: Chat can create canonical model instances for selected models.
Chat can update canonical instance metadata/state safely.

suggestion.gap: Requirements do not list canonical asset lifecycle operations for chat authoring.
suggestion.proposal: Add requirement for canonical create/rename/toggle operation support.
